title: Cross-Repo Asset Manifest v1
summary: Create an immutable metadata inventory of repository roles, reusable assets, exact references, ownership, reuse mode, licensing, sensitivity, and known gaps across the RTS ecosystem.
original_problem: Past assets are distributed across 19 repositories, so new work can duplicate code, miss useful history, violate repository boundaries, or accidentally expose private material.
why_it_matters: A deterministic asset map is the prerequisite for every later loop stage and materially reduces research, integration, privacy, licensing, and hidden-dependency risk.
reason_frozen: Held until GitHub survey, build-value assessment, and implementation ground survey were completed.
preserved_value: Append-only snapshots, deterministic repository/asset/ownership indexes, hard privacy/license/ownership checks, exact evidence references, and reusable CLI operations.
trigger_conditions: Private repositories can be represented as safe metadata only
Deterministic validation and rollback are available
negative_triggers: Repository bodies must be copied into RTS
Secrets/customer data/private prompts would enter public history
Canonical ownership conflicts cannot be detected
